description: Tarun Chitra discusses market trends, the challenges of creator coins, and insights on Launchcoin in this episode of the TG Podcast.
topic_summary: In this episode, Tarun Chitra shares his experiences with market dynamics and creator coins, highlighting issues and opportunities in the crypto space. He also touches on his work with Robot Ventures and Gauntlet, focusing on risk management in DeFi [t=80.30].
